abort.single_instance_allowed: Only a single SBB Dashboard Cards instance is allowed.

error.event_entities_required: Disable test triggers only if all three event entities are set.

user.title: SBB Dashboard Cards
user.description: Select your entities and output filenames. The integration will generate dashboard and package YAML files.

error.event_entities_required: Disable test triggers only if all three event entities are set.

init.title: SBB Dashboard Cards options
init.description: Update entities and output paths. Saving options regenerates files.

generate_files.name: Generate dashboard files
generate_files.description: Generate or regenerate dashboard and package YAML files from current integration settings.

entry_id.name: Config entry ID
entry_id.description: Optional. Generate files only for this specific SBB Dashboard Cards config entry.

overwrite.name: Overwrite existing files
overwrite.description: If true, existing files are overwritten.
